issue.message: The Google Play store has a policy that limits usage of MANAGE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE
Consider using `apply()` instead; `commit` writes its data to persistent storage immediately, whereas `apply` will handle it in the background

Do not hardcode "`/data/`"; use `Context.getFilesDir().getPath()` instead
Do not hardcode "/sdcard/"; use `Environment.getExternalStorageDirectory().getPath()` instead
Do not hardcode "`/data/`"; use `Context.getFilesDir().getPath()` instead
Do not hardcode "`/data/`"; use `Context.getFilesDir().getPath()` instead

Overriding `@bool/config_materialPreferenceIconSpaceReserved` which is marked as private in androidx.preference:preference:1.2.1. If deliberate, use tools:override="true", otherwise pick a different name.

Fixed screen orientations will be ignored in most cases, starting from Android 16. Android is moving toward a model where apps are expected to adapt to various orientations, display sizes, and aspect ratios.

Formatting %d followed by words ("items"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string

issue.message: Missing x86_64 ABI support for ChromeOS
Setting file permissions to world-readable can be risky, review carefully
Setting file permissions to world-writable can be risky, review carefully
The Network Security Configuration allows the use of user certificates in the release version of your app
Insecure Base Configuration
It will always be more efficient to use more specific change events if you can. Rely on `notifyDataSetChanged` as a last resort.
Unnecessary; `Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= Build.VERSION_CODES.O` is always true here (`SDK_INT` ≥ 28 and < 31)
Unnecessary; `Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= Build.VERSION_CODES.M` is always true here (`SDK_INT` ≥ 28 and < 30)
This folder configuration (`v26`) is unnecessary; `minSdkVersion` is 28. Merge all the resources in this folder into `mipmap-anydpi`.
Do not place Android context classes in static fields (static reference to `FileLoggingTree` which has field `context` pointing to `Context`); this is a memory leak

Custom view `LogPanelRecyclerView` overrides `onTouchEvent` but not `performClick`
Custom view `OutputView` overrides `onTouchEvent` but not `performClick`
Assigning `Locale.getDefault()` to a final static field is suspicious; this code will not work correctly if the user changes locale while the app is running
Assigning `Locale.getDefault()` to a final static field is suspicious; this code will not work correctly if the user changes locale while the app is running
issue.errorLine1: private val timeFormat = SimpleDateFormat("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss", Locale.getDefault())

issue.message: Hardcoded string "调试", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "运行", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "保存", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "设置", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "生成 compile_commands.json", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "关闭项目", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "清空输出", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "允许编辑", should use `@string` resource
